evals.prompt: Add these 5 URLs to my library: <url1>, <url2>, <url3>, <url4>, <url5>
evals.expected_output: Parallel uploads with a per-URL success/failure/duplicate report and a delta showing the library doc count before vs after.
assertions: upload_url is called for each of the 5 URLs
Calls are batched in parallel (not strictly sequential)
list_documents (or list_projects) is called both before and after to compute the delta
Per-URL results are reported (succeeded / failed / duplicate)

evals.prompt: I just imported 200 papers — please rebuild the graph and verify entities materialized.
evals.expected_output: rebuild_graph_edges is called once, followed by explore_entities to confirm entity extraction.
assertions: User is warned that rebuild_graph_edges is expensive before it runs
rebuild_graph_edges is called exactly once for the batch (not per-document)
explore_entities is called after the rebuild to verify new entities exist
Output reports the entity count (or sample) post-rebuild

evals.prompt: Clean up storage for documents I've deleted.
evals.expected_output: cleanup_orphaned_vectors is called after explaining what it does, with a before/after vector-count summary if available.
assertions: Response explains what cleanup_orphaned_vectors does before invoking it
Response describes the cleanup as removing embeddings for deleted documents (not the documents themselves)
